hero.title: Book a berth with ease
hero.subtitle: Find an available spot in Estonian ports

Landing.title: Find Your Perfect
Landing.description: Whether you own a sailboat, yacht, or commercial vessel, discover and book premium berths across Estonian harbours with real-time availability and instant confirmation.

HowItWorks.title: How It Works
HowItWorks.subtitle: We ripped out the traditional booking calendars. SadamaAgent is a fully autonomous AI system wired directly into the national marina database.
HowItWorks.step1Desc: Don't bother clicking through endless calendars or filling out forms. Your time is valuable.
HowItWorks.step2Desc: Just open the Marina Assistant chat. Tell it your vessel length, draft, and when you want to arrive.
HowItWorks.step3Desc: Provide your name and contact. The agent will lock in the reservation directly and send email confirmation.

Berths.title: Available Berths & Marina Slips
Berths.subtitle: From cozy marina slips for sailboats to large-capacity berths for yachts. Real-time availability.
Berths.empty: No berths found for this port.

FooterNav.desc: Estonia's premier marina and harbour booking platform for boat owners, yachts, and commercial vessels.

ChatWidget.title: Marina Assistant
ChatWidget.disclaimer: Powered by AI - Responses may vary
ChatWidget.welcome: Welcome to SadamaAgent! I am your AI marina assistant connected to live port availability. How can I help you book a berth today?

Auth.title: Welcome Back
Auth.subtitle: Sign in to access your marina dashboard
